description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a main battle tank, with a long, prominent cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull is robust and angular, featuring thick armor plating along the sides and front, with visible hatches, periscopes, and external equipment such as spare track links and storage boxes. The turret is equipped with a secondary machine gun mount and various observation devices, while the main gun extends significantly forward. The vehicle rides on a set of large, rugged road wheels and continuous metal tracks, designed for traversing rough terrain. The exterior is painted in a dark, matte camouflage scheme with visible weathering and operational wear. Military markings, including numbers and insignia, are present on the turret and hull, adding to its authentic battlefield appearance.
description: A dark, heavily armored tracked tank with a long cannon, secondary machine gun, and visible military markings. The vehicle features thick armor, rugged tracks, and a weathered camouflage finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the long main cannon, turret details, and the complete set of road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick frontal armor, the barrel of the main gun, and the compact, imposing profile of the tank.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and side armor, with visible storage boxes and track details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, rear armor, and exhaust or engine grilles, as well as the rear track assembly.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, sloped panels on the front, sides, and turret; reinforced and angular with visible weld lines and modular sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark green and black camouflage with irregular, weathered patches and a matte finish.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers '343' on the turret and hull sides, small insignia on the turret, and additional stenciled text on the hull.
